landing.heroBody: CyberScope pairs a deep Playwright crawler with 54 attack modules, triple-model AI verification, and a live CVE feed. Built for bug bounty hunters, red teams, and MSSPs.

features.title: Built for humans who ship exploits, not tickets.

killer.title: Killer Attack Modules
killer.body: JWT cracking, GraphQL introspection, HTTP Smuggling v2, Deep SSRF (cloud metadata), Prototype Pollution, Race Conditions, MFA Bypass — 54 modules in total.

ai.title: AI Autopilot + FP Killer
ai.body: Triple-model voting (Claude Sonnet 4.6 · GPT · Gemini) cuts false-positives to near-zero and builds novel exploit chains automatically.

crawler.title: Deep Crawler v2 (Playwright)
crawler.body: BFS priority queue · 150+ hidden-param mining · sitemap + wayback + urlscan seeds · JS-rendered SPA capture · GraphQL/WebSocket auto-detect.

intel.title: Live Threat Intel
intel.body: CVE feed sync from NVD · weekly AI intel briefs tuned to YOUR stack · compliance mapping (SOC2 · PCI · HIPAA · ISO27001).

team.title: Team Workspaces + RBAC
team.body: Multi-analyst workspaces · invite by email · owner / admin / analyst / viewer · assign findings · threaded comments.

continuous.title: Continuous Monitors
continuous.body: Re-scan on schedule · webhook to Discord / Slack / Telegram · diff against last run · new-finding-only alerts.

deploy.title: Ship the entire arsenal to your own box.
deploy.body: Enterprise and Lifetime plans unlock a downloadable .tar.gz release — Docker, docker-compose, CLI, and 219K bundled payloads. Zero telemetry.
deploy.downloadLocked: Upgrade to Enterprise to unlock download

final.title: Stop chasing findings. Start owning them.
final.body: Sign up and get 5 free deep scans. No credit card. Cancel with one click.

pricing.title: Pick your tier.
pricing.body: Every plan ships with the full 54-module arsenal. Higher tiers unlock team seats, AI Autopilot, and continuous monitors.
pricing.canceled: Checkout canceled — pick a tier below when you're ready.

rows.cve: CVE live sync + Threat Intel briefs

signup.title: Create your CyberScope account
signup.subtitle: 5 free scans. No credit card required.
signup.name: Name (optional)
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

billing.title: Subscription & Invoices
billing.subtitle: Manage your CyberScope tier, quotas, and payment methods.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: Command center for all your scans, live metrics, and quick-launch tools. Use 'AI Autopilot' to let the LLM plan a full scan for you, or 'Launch Attack' to fire a targeted module.

newScan.title: New Scan
newScan.body: Enter a target URL or domain. Deep mode uses Playwright JS rendering + 150+ hidden-param mining. Choose Modules to limit which attacks run.

weaponry.title: Weaponry
weaponry.body: 6 advanced attack tabs: HTTP Smuggling · Cache Poisoning · AI Payload Generator · Prototype Pollution · SSRF Deep · MFA Bypass. Provide targets and click Run.

billing.title: Billing
billing.body: Change your plan, cancel any time, or open the Stripe portal to update your card and download invoices.

workspaces.title: Team Workspaces
workspaces.body: Invite teammates by email. Roles: owner (full control) · admin (manage members) · analyst (run scans + comment) · viewer (read-only).
